expect: Recombination substrate (missing edges) has analytical properties derivable from citation graph. Bridge between L-1130 (mechanism) and L-1181 (analytical solutions) exists.
actual: R=4.35:1 fragmentation ratio measured (7.49 creation vs 1.72 bridging per lesson). Score-stratified: only 2% high-value (>=50). Cross-domain citations already 51.7%. 2874 total missing edges, ~57 actionable. Biological analog: Muller's ratchet.
diff: Expected analytical form: CONFIRMED. Key surprise: the 4.35:1 ratio is NOT a crisis because score stratification shows 98% of missing edges are background noise. Integration-bound (L-912) is real but manageable.
